metadata.title: Nailing a Sneaky 2v1 Site Defense with Tight Angles in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Here’s a tense site defense where moving quietly and holding tight angles wins the round. How do you stay calm in clutch moments?

Share your best defensive plays below!
